rationale: Educ. Code §37.214 governs a center's authority to accept gifts and donations. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The center may solicit and accept gifts, grants, and donations from public and private entities to use for the purposes of this subchapter.
_note: No conflict. The cited education provision is unrelated to homestead exemption valuation.
